info.title: Restaurant Management Backend
info.description: API documentation for Users, Brands, and Outlets. All responses follow IApiResponse format.

password.description: At least 6 chars with uppercase, lowercase, number and special character

shortCodes.description: Up to 2 codes; unique per brand+outlet (case-insensitive)

isVariation.description: True if item has any variants

AddonInputCreate.description: Addon input for create; allowedItems ignored at create time

AddonInputUpdate.description: Addon input for update; supports allowedItems

shortCodes.description: Up to 2 codes; unique per brand+outlet (case-insensitive)

variations.description: If provided, creates per-variation prices and per-variation addons

addons.description: Objects with addonId, selection rules; allowedItems is ignored on create
Item-level addons (used only when variations are not provided); allowedItems is ignored on create

shortCodes.description: Up to 2 codes; unique per brand+outlet (case-insensitive)

addons.description: Optional: item-level addon updates (used when variations are not provided)

CategoryWiseGroup.description: A category with its non-deleted menu items

tags.name: Categories
tags.description: Requires brand-id for detail/update/delete; brand-id and outlet-id for create/list.

tags.name: Menu-Items
tags.description: Requires brand-id and outlet-id on all endpoints. Set via Authorize.

post.description: Creates a new user. The `brand-id` header is mandatory. The `outlet-id` header is optional; if provided, it will be added to the user's `outlets` list. Note: `outlets` in payload is ignored; user is assigned only to the outlet in the header (if present).

400.description: Plan outlet limit reached or brand not found
